summary.what_built: This module creates a health endpoint to check the status of a database.
summary.problem: It solves the problem of monitoring database operational status.
summary.risk: Medium risk because it only supports SQLite and lacks integration with a web framework.
summary.validation: The code was checked for syntax errors and basic functionality.
summary.on_apply: When the operator clicks Apply, the new health endpoint code will be added to the specified path in the repository.
summary.uncertainty: It is uncertain how this will perform in a live environment, especially with different database types.
